'''kabotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zafirlukast|zafirlukast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zafirlukast|zafirlukast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kabotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæbetheth|kæbetheth]] || [[word:kæbethej|kæbethej]] || [[word:kæbethesh|kæbethesh]] || [[word:kæbethe|kæbethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kabobothoth|kabobothoth]] || [[word:kabobothoj|kabobothoj]] || [[word:kabobothosh|kabobothosh]] || [[word:kabobotho|kabobotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kabothoth|kabothoth]] || [[word:kabothoj|kabothoj]] || [[word:kabothosh|kabothosh]] || [[word:kabotho|kabotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kabofthoth|kabofthoth]] || [[word:kabofthoj|kabofthoj]] || [[word:kabofthosh|kabofthosh]] || [[word:kabofthof|kabofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kabothotho|kabothotho]] || [[word:kabothojo|kabothojo]] || [[word:kabothosho|kabothosho]] || [[word:kabothoko|kabothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kabothoth|kabothoth]] || [[word:kabothoj|kabothoj]] || [[word:kabothosh|kabothosh]] || [[word:kabotho|kabotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kabothothol|kabothothol]] || [[word:kabothojol|kabothojol]] || [[word:kabothoshol|kabothoshol]] || [[word:kabothokol|kabothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kabothothotho|kabothothotho]] || [[word:kabothojojo|kabothojojo]] || [[word:kabothoshosho|kabothoshosho]] || [[word:kabothoko|kabothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kabothothon|kabothothon]] || [[word:kabothojon|kabothojon]] || [[word:kabothoshon|kabothoshon]] || [[word:kabothokon|kabothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kabothothoro|kabothothoro]] || [[word:kabothojoro|kabothojoro]] || [[word:kabothoshoro|kabothoshoro]] || [[word:kabothokoro|kabothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
